guile-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

guile-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
guile-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Main combo starter, can chain into 4HP Target Combo; SA2 cancel: +17/+11

guile-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Punish counter +14
guile-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Stagger effect makes it useful as a whiff punish; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; SA2 cancel: +18/+13

guile-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
guile-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Decent range light poke, but must let go of back charge before LK input making the execution a bit harder; SA2 cancel: +10/+6; DR cancel is delayed until after 1st recovery frame

guile-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
guile-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: SA2 cancel: +21/+13; can link into 2LP at point blank, 2MP on close range Counter-hit, or 5HP on mid-range Punish Counter

guile-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
guile-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; SA2 cancel: +9/+2; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-6 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

guile-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
notes: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
guile-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: 3f extra recovery on whiff; low pushback on hit; chains into itself for a launching Target Combo; has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery; SA2 cancel: +13/+7; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-8 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

guile-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
guile-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Good vertical anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); forces stand on hit (useful to create consistent spacing in Sonic Boom loops); SA2 cancel: +18/+9

guile-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

guile-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
guile-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Good poke, especially when used from Drive Rush; significantly more range on 2nd active frame (may not work as an 8f punish at some ranges)

guile-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when the first attack lands as a Punish Counter

guile-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

guile-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent for a counter

guile-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

full-bullet-magnum.name: Full Bullet Magnum
full-bullet-magnum.name_ja: フルブレットマグナム
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
full-bullet-magnum.notes_sc: Fast and high damage for a command overhead; spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents

burning-straight.name: Burning Straight
notes: A quick strike that can be canceled into special moves
burning-straight.notes_sc: Good buffer tool that allows Guile to maintain back charge; SA2 cancel: +18/+13

spinning-back-knuckle.name: Spinning Back Knuckle
spinning-back-knuckle.name_ja: スピニングバックナックル
notes: Move forward while striking with the back of your fist. Allows you to move before your opponent even if blocked
spinning-back-knuckle.notes_sc: Whiffs vs. crouching opponents; has some juggle potential; long forward movement

knee-bazooka.name: Knee Bazooka
notes: A forward-moving knee strike that's quick and difficult to counterattack. Can be performed while maintaining your backward charge
knee-bazooka.notes_sc: 7-17f low crush (not airborne); has some juggle potential; great approach option out of Drive Rush; the final active frame requires incredible precise spacing to connect (for practical purposes, the max frame advantage is +3/-1)

rolling-sobat-backward.name: Rolling Sobat (Backward)
rolling-sobat-backward.name_ja: ローリングソバット (後ろ)
notes: A quick hop kick that's difficult to counterattack. Depending on what direction you hold, you can move either forward or backward while performing it
Invincible to low attacks from frames 7 - 17

rolling-sobat-forward.name: Rolling Sobat (Forward)
rolling-sobat-forward.name_ja: ローリングソバット (前方)
notes: A quick hop kick that's difficult to counterattack. Depending on what direction you hold, you can move either forward or backward while performing it
Invincible to low attacks from frames 7 - 17
23 frames of recovery (34 frames overall) added if the attack misses

reverse-spin-kick.name: Reverse Spin Kick
reverse-spin-kick.name_ja: リバーススピンキック
notes: An attack with long reach that is useful against an opponent's sweeps
Invincible to throws and low attacks on frames 4 - 28
Forces a juggle state knockdown on counter hit
Produces a crumple stun on PunisH Counter

invuln.throw: Invincible to throws and low attacks on frames 4 - 28

reverse-spin-kick.notes_sc: 4-28f low crush/throw invuln (not airborne); Counter-hit causes knockdown vs. grounded/airborne opponents (KD +29~); Punish Counter causes crumple vs. grounded and limited juggle state vs. airborne; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

guile-high-kick.name: Guile High Kick
notes: A high kick that is useful against jumping opponents. Can be performed while maintaining your downward charge
Forces a juggle state when the attack lands for a Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent for a counter
Can be canceled into a special move from frames 18 - 19
guile-high-kick.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state on CH; puts grounded/airborne opponents into free juggle state on PC; not a reliable anti-air; SA2 cancel: +12/+3; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 5th recovery frame; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

recoil-cannon.name: Recoil Cannon
notes: A combination attack that sends an opponent flying
Can cancel into a special move or Super Art from frames 8 - 9
recoil-cannon.notes_sc: 2f gap on block; puts opponents into limited juggle state; frames 8-9 of 4HP animation are kara-cancelable (shifts Guile backwards); SA2 cancel: KD+57/+13

double-shot.name: Double Shot
notes: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves
double-shot.notes_sc: Puts opponents into limited juggle state; +12 extra KD Adv when canceled into SA2; 2f gap between hits on block; SA2 cancel: KD+56/+6

drake-fang.name: Drake Fang
notes: A low attack followed by an overhead attack
drake-fang.notes_sc: () refers to 20% scaled damage from 2MK combo starter; low into overhead string; has a 5f gap between hits on block that can lead to trade combos; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; Counter-hit/Punish Counter puts the opponent into a limited juggle OTG bounce state; 2nd hit maintains the CH/PC state from the initial 2MK

phantom-cutter.name: Phantom Cutter
notes: A low attack into a high kick that launches an opponent into the air. These two hits form a combo if done as a Punish Counter
phantom-cutter.notes_sc: (refers to 20% scaled damage from 2HK); only combos from 1st hit of 2HK on Punish Counter, after Drive Rush, or in juggles; very lenient confirm window; puts opponent into limited juggle state; whiffs on crouching opponents (works after Punish Counter 2HK due to juggle state); SA2 cancel: KD +47/+4; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 5th recovery frame

dragon-suplex.name: Dragon Suplex
dragon-suplex.name_ja: ドラゴンスープレックス
notes: When near opponent
Whirl behind your opponent and, while grabbing one of their arms and their head, slam them into the ground with a suplex. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
dragon-suplex.notes_sc: No corner throw loop without Drive Rush (with frame-perfect timing, can throw loop vs. Blanka, E. Honda, and Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

judo-throw.name: Judo Throw
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent and toss them behind you, placing their weight on your arm and shoulder. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
judo-throw.notes_sc: Side switch; Drive Rush is required for throw/strike oki after back throwing opponent into corner; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

flying-mare.name: Flying Mare
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Grab an airborne opponent and toss them to the ground below. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
flying-mare.notes_sc: Higher air throw gives slightly better KD Adv.; gives oki if near the corner

flying-buster-drop.name: Flying Buster Drop
flying-buster-drop.name_ja: フレイングバスタードロップ
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Grab an airborne opponent and smash their back with your shoulder as you descend. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
flying-buster-drop.notes_sc: Side switch; if throwing opponent back into the corner, can Drive Rush for meaty strike (no true throw oki)

sonic-boom-light.name: Sonic Boom (Light)
notes: Cross your arms with such speed that you fire a rotating aerial slash. Useful for checking distant opponents or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

perfect-timing-sonic-boom-light.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Boom (Light)
perfect-timing-sonic-boom-light.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニックブーム (弱)
notes: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

sonic-boom-medium.name: Sonic Boom (Medium)
notes: Cross your arms with such speed that you fire a rotating aerial slash. Useful for checking distant opponents or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

perfect-timing-sonic-boom-medium.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Boom (Medium)
perfect-timing-sonic-boom-medium.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニックブーム (中)
notes: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

sonic-boom-heavy.name: Sonic Boom (Heavy)
notes: Cross your arms with such speed that you fire a rotating aerial slash. Useful for checking distant opponents or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

perfect-timing-sonic-boom-heavy.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Boom (Heavy)
perfect-timing-sonic-boom-heavy.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニックブーム (強)
notes: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

sonic-boom-od.name: Sonic Boom (OD)
notes: Cross your arms with such speed that you fire a rotating aerial slash. Useful for checking distant opponents or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to Overdrive Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

somersault-kick-light.name: Somersault Kick (Light)
somersault-kick-light.name_ja: サマーソルトキック (弱)
notes: Perform a backwards somersault while unleashing a devastating kick. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36
Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7

perfect-timing-somersault-kick-light.name: [Perfect timing] Somersault Kick (Light)
perfect-timing-somersault-kick-light.name_ja: 【ジャスト】サマーソルトキック (弱)
notes: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36
Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7

somersault-kick-medium.name: Somersault Kick (Medium)
somersault-kick-medium.name_ja: サマーソルトキック (中)
notes: Perform a backwards somersault while unleashing a devastating kick. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 38
Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

perfect-timing-somersault-kick-medium.name: [Perfect timing] Somersault Kick (Medium)
perfect-timing-somersault-kick-medium.name_ja: 【ジャスト】サマーソルトキック (中)
notes: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 38
Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

somersault-kick-heavy.name: Somersault Kick (Heavy)
somersault-kick-heavy.name_ja: サマーソルトキック (強)
notes: Perform a backwards somersault while unleashing a devastating kick. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 40
Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9

perfect-timing-somersault-kick-heavy.name: [Perfect timing] Somersault Kick (Heavy)
perfect-timing-somersault-kick-heavy.name_ja: 【ジャスト】サマーソルトキック (強)
notes: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 40
Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9

somersault-kick-od.name: Somersault Kick (OD)
notes: Perform a backwards somersault while unleashing a devastating kick. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 37
Does 700 individual damage from frames 3 - 4

sonic-blade-light.name: Sonic Blade (Light)
notes: Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to all Sonic Break variations from frames 35 - 40

sonic-blade-medium.name: Sonic Blade (Medium)
notes: Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 40 - 46

sonic-blade-heavy.name: Sonic Blade (Heavy)
notes: Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 50 - 54

sonic-blade-od.name: Sonic Blade (OD)
notes: Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 34 - 39

sonic-cross-light.name: Sonic Cross (Light)
notes: During Sonic Blade
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile

perfect-timing-sonic-cross-light.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Cross (Light)
perfect-timing-sonic-cross-light.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニッククロス (弱)
notes: During Sonic Blade

sonic-cross-medium.name: Sonic Cross (Medium)
notes: During Sonic Blade
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile

perfect-timing-sonic-cross-medium.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Cross (Medium)
perfect-timing-sonic-cross-medium.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニッククロス (中)
notes: During Sonic Blade

sonic-cross-heavy.name: Sonic Cross (Heavy)
notes: During Sonic Blade
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile

perfect-timing-sonic-cross-heavy.name: [Perfect timing] Sonic Cross (Heavy)
perfect-timing-sonic-cross-heavy.name_ja: 【ジャスト】ソニッククロス (強)
notes: During Sonic Blade

sonic-cross-od-1.name: Sonic Cross (OD 1)
notes: During Sonic Blade
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile

sonic-cross-od-1-sonic-blade.name: Sonic Cross (OD 1 — Sonic Blade OD)
sonic-cross-od-1-sonic-blade.name_ja: ソニッククロス (OD 1・ソニックブレードOD)
notes: During Solinc Blade OD
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile

sonic-cross-od-2.name: Sonic Cross (OD 2)
notes: During Sonic Blade OD
Combine Sonic Blade with another aerial slash and fire it as a projectile
Produces a wall splat after it hits

sonic-hurricane-up.name: Sonic Hurricane (Up)
sonic-hurricane-up.name_ja: ソニックハリケーン (上)
notes: Fire a massive aerial slash directly ahead. An extremely versatile move that can be used in combos, to counter projectiles, or as a way to turn the tables when being pressured. The angle of the attack can be changed depending on the command input
Invincible to throws and strikes on frame 1
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to throws and strikes on frame 1

sonic-hurricane-side.name: Sonic Hurricane (Side)
sonic-hurricane-side.name_ja: ソニックハリケーン (横)
notes: Fire a massive aerial slash directly ahead. An extremely versatile move that can be used in combos, to counter projectiles, or as a way to turn the tables when being pressured. The angle of the attack can be changed depending on the command input
Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 8
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 8

solid-puncher.name: Solid Puncher
notes: Envelop both arms in aerial slashes and enables the use of Sonic Break
Sonic Break can be performed after this technique is activated
solid-puncher.notes_sc: Gives access to Sonic Break follow-ups; remaining active time decreases by 200f with each Sonic Break use (maximum 7 uses)

sonic-break-single-shot.name: Sonic Break (Single Shot)
sonic-break-single-shot.name_ja: ソニックブレイク（単発）
notes: During Solid Puncher
Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to a regular Sonic Break (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) from frames 13 - 21

sonic-break-variation.name: Sonic Break (Variation)
sonic-break-variation.name_ja: ソニックブレイク（派生）
notes: During Solid Puncher
During Sonic Boom or Sonic Break
Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to a regular Sonic Break (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) from frames 13 - 21, up to 3 times
The last transition’s recovery is reduced by 1 frame

sonic-break-od.name: Sonic Break (OD)
notes: During Solid Puncher
During Sonic Boom OD or Sonic Break OD
Used to fire aerial slashes while Solid Puncher is active. The speed of the projectile can be modified with directional inputs
Can transition to Overdrive Sonic Break (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) once from frames 13 - 21

crossfire-somersault.name: Crossfire Somersault
crossfire-somersault.name_ja: クロスファイアサマーソルト
notes: When under 25% vitality

Launch your opponent into the air and follow up with a mighty somersault kick. It has invincibility at the beginning, making it useful as an anti-air attack or as a way to turn the tables on your opponent
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14
Considered airborne from frames 12 - 44
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Does 3000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame
Applied only when canceling a special move
crossfire-somersault.notes_sc: 45f charge (charge lasts 22f after releasing back direction); active frames 3-6 give a non-cinematic hit with reduced damage and chip; cannot hit cross-up; cinematic time regenerates ~1.8 Drive bars for Guile

crossfire-somersault-ca.name: Crossfire Somersault (Critical Art)
crossfire-somersault-ca.name_ja: クロスファイアサマーソルト (CA)
notes: When under 25% vitality

Launch your opponent into the air and follow up with a mighty somersault kick. It has invincibility at the beginning, making it useful as an anti-air attack or as a way to turn the tables on your opponent
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14
Considered airborne from frames 12 - 44
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Does 3500 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame
Applied only when canceling a special move
